parameters.query:
with interval_types as (
  select '15m'::text as interval_type
  union all
  select '60m'::text as interval_type
), grouped as (
  select
    p.source_id,
    p.market_id,
    it.interval_type,
    case
      when it.interval_type = '15m' then to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from p.delivery_start) / 900) * 900)
      when it.interval_type = '60m' then date_trunc('hour', p.delivery_start)
    end as interval_start,
    case
      when it.interval_type = '15m' then to_timestamp(floor(extract(epoch from p.delivery_start) / 900) * 900) + interval '15 minutes'
      when it.interval_type = '60m' then date_trunc('hour', p.delivery_start) + interval '1 hour'
    end as interval_end,
    max(p.price_eur_mwh) as high_price_eur_mwh,
    min(p.price_eur_mwh) as low_price_eur_mwh,
    (array_agg(p.price_eur_mwh order by coalesce(p.source_published_at, p.ingested_at) desc, p.ingested_at desc))[1] as last_price_eur_mwh,
    count(*)::integer as observation_count
  from energy_data.market_price_points p
  cross join interval_types it
  where p.delivery_start >= now() - interval '3 days'
    and p.delivery_start < now() + interval '3 days'
  group by p.source_id, p.market_id, it.interval_type, interval_start, interval_end
), upserted as (
  insert into energy_data.market_price_ohlc (
    source_id,
    market_id,
    interval_type,
    interval_start,
    interval_end,
    high_price_eur_mwh,
    low_price_eur_mwh,
    last_price_eur_mwh,
    observation_count,
    calculated_from
  )
  select
    source_id,
    market_id,
    interval_type,
    interval_start,
    interval_end,
    high_price_eur_mwh,
    low_price_eur_mwh,
    last_price_eur_mwh,
    observation_count,
    'market_price_points'
  from grouped
  on conflict (source_id, market_id, interval_type, interval_start, interval_end) do update
  set
    high_price_eur_mwh = excluded.high_price_eur_mwh,
    low_price_eur_mwh = excluded.low_price_eur_mwh,
    last_price_eur_mwh = excluded.last_price_eur_mwh,
    observation_count = excluded.observation_count,
    calculated_from = excluded.calculated_from,
    calculated_at = now()
  returning 1
)
insert into energy_data.ingestion_runs (
  workflow_name,
  source_id,
  finished_at,
  status,
  records_read,
  records_written
)
select
  'market_price_ohlc_builder',
  (select id from energy_data.data_sources where code = 'calculated'),
  now(),
  'success',
  (select count(*)::integer from grouped),
  (select count(*)::integer from upserted);
